query:
INSERT INTO sports_day_registrations (
  id, userId, fullName, sportsDayProfile, profileTagline, referralCode, 
  teamColour, shirtSize, shirtFit, revealStatus, unlockToken, paymentMatchStatus, manualUnlock
) VALUES (
  'test-unlock-' || hex(randomblob(8)),
  1,
  'Test Player',
  'The Tester',
  'Testing the payment flow',
  'TESTCODE',
  'red',
  'M',
  'regular',
  'locked',
  hex(randomblob(16)),
  'none',
  0
);
